description: Foundation Repair

There was a water intrusion, which lead to discovering design flaw in the second floor porch. With guidance from Trapolin-Peer Architects, the porch will be redesigned so water will not get into the building again.

Facade improvements: repaint all exterior wall and ceiling surfaces, including garage; repair and refinish existing balconies, including railing, soffits, fascia panels, etc., replace all windows; repair/replace framing, sheathing, cladding and flashing, as needed Roofing improvements: remove existing spray applied roofing, foam, and substrate down to plywood decking; repair/replace any damaged decking and framing, and replace with a new SBS and tapered rigid foam system; replace mansard roofing material, underlayment and flashing Entrance improvements: consolidate to a single entrance door at Amelia street; incorporate a new ADA compliant ramp and stair; replace/repair existing finishes in ground floor elevator lobby Site: repair and refinish CMU privacy wall; new hardscaping and landscaping
Repair and Renovate existing building as funeral home
